name: Open Liquid Blob
css: .darma-loader-open-liquid-blob{display:inline-block;width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:38% 62% 55% 45%/45% 39% 61% 55%;background:radial-gradient(circle at 28% 28%,color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-secondary-color,#8b5cf6) 85%,white),transparent 23%),linear-gradient(135deg,var(--loader-color,#14b8a6),var(--loader-secondary-color,#8b5cf6));box-shadow:0 16px 36px color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#14b8a6) 34%,transparent);animation:darma-loader-open-liquid-blob-morph var(--loader-speed,1.8s) ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes darma-loader-open-liquid-blob-morph{0%,100%{border-radius:38% 62% 55% 45%/45% 39% 61% 55%;transform:rotate(0) scale(1)}50%{border-radius:58% 42% 36% 64%/62% 45% 55% 38%;transform:rotate(14deg) scale(1.05)}}
